imputationJustification: Mean imputation was selected because the literature dataset is small and highly heterogeneous across sources; KNN neighbors are unstable under grouped cross-validation.

stageResults.description: Raw literature subset with exact label parsing only.
Remove exact duplicate records after target parsing.
Remove near-duplicate records using sequence similarity inside source-stage groups.
Apply IQR and modified z-score outlier removal after de-duplication.
Add context variables and apply mean/KNN imputation with standardization and normalization.
Apply model-based feature selection before the ensemble regressor.
Random-search tuned ensemble with grouped cross-validation and feature selection.
Strict semantic head LOSO with eligible purity/yield heads and source-aware shrinkage calibration.

scalingRationale.standardization: Large-magnitude continuous physicochemical variables were standardized to zero mean and unit variance.
scalingRationale.normalization: Ratios and bounded heuristic synthesis scores were scaled to the [0, 1] range to keep them comparable and interpretable.
